sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 12:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 12:1
items.html: Two causes preceded the screen: the restriction and the arrival of the light. This is because the screen appears only when the upper light comes and touches phase four (see answer 43).
